name: WF01 Extension — Brand → Social Media App Config Sync

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "configName": "{{$json.configName}}",
  "creatorsCategory": "{{$json.creatorsCategory}}",
  "analysisInstruction": "# CONCEPT
Overall description of the concept (1-3 sentences).

# HOOK
- VISUAL: first 1-2 seconds
- TEXT: on-screen statement (max 6-8 words)
- AUDIO: first spoken words

# RETENTION MECHANISMS
How the creator retains viewers.

# REWARD
Value the viewer gets.

# SCRIPT
Full script (1-20 sentences).

RULE: THE SHORTER THE BETTER.",
  "newConceptsInstruction": "{{$json.newConceptsInstruction}}"
}

meta.notes: SETUP: Set n8n variables SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON, SOCIAL_MEDIA_APP_URL, N8N_BASE_URL. This workflow: (1) saves brand profile to Supabase, (2) optionally triggers WF02 BrandVoice, (3) auto-generates a newConceptsInstruction prompt from brand data (company, personas, tone), (4) creates or updates the matching config in the social media app. Result: every time you save Branding Bio, the competitor video analysis pipeline gets an updated brand-specific prompt automatically.
